name: root-eslint-config
description: Fake package to make project-wide eslint config work.  If we don't place the eslint-config-google dependency here, eslint will fail to find it.  Not published.

scripts.lint: result=0; for i in base backends/*; do (cd $i && npm run lint) || result=$?; done; exit $result
scripts.lint-fix: for i in base backends/*; do (cd $i && npm run lint -- --fix); done
scripts.test: result=0; for i in base backends/*; do (cd $i && npm test) || result=$?; done; exit $result
